channel.title: Quality3Ds Daily Pulse
channel.description: Curated daily news for 3D printing enthusiasts.

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #167 - 2026-06-23
item.description:
♻️ 3DPOD 303: 6K Additive CEO Frank Roberts on Premium and Sustainable Metal AM Powder 6K Additive is roaring ahead with a recycling solution for metals. Their path from scrap to powder is helping the US to be more resilient, produce powder locally and perhaps, reported by 3DPrint.com on Jun 22, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/326058/3dpod-303-6k-additive-ceo-frank-roberts-on-premium-and-sustainable-metal-am-powder

📰 Phase3D closes oversubscribed $2.9 million funding round The company says the investment marks a 'deliberate and exciting' new chapter for Phase3D, with a plan in place to move from a 'high-mix custom build model to standardised product manufacturing at scale.' Reported by TCT Magazine on Jun 22, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/06/PHASE3D_DAY02_122-1.jpg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/phase3d-closes-oversubscribed-2-9-million-funding-round

🏠 Malaysia set for “first” 3D construction printing standards framework V3D Asia Ltd and its commercial arm, Nuvah Sdn Bhd, have entered into a collaboration with SIRIM Academy Sdn Bhd to develop what the companies claim is Malaysia’s first set … The post Malaysia set for “first” 3D... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 22, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/V3D-Asia-Nuvah-SIRIM-Academy-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/malaysia-set-for-first-3d-construction-printing-standards-framework

🏠 500m² 3D printed recycling center erected in Portugal As Portugal gears up to face Uzbekistan in the 2026 World Cup tomorrow, there is also other excitement on the home front, particularly for fans of 3D printing. Portuguese 3D … The post 500m² 3D printed recycling center erected in Portugal appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/cobod-portugal-recycling-center-1-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/500m%c2%b2-3d-printed-recycling-center-erected-in-portugal

📰 Continuous Composites to support U.S. Army DEVCOM Aviation and Missile Center via multi-year contract Continuous Composites is assessing opportunities to apply its CF3D technology, advanced materials, and fibre-steered design capabilities within the Precision Strike Missile architecture. Reported by TCT Magazine on Jun 22, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/06/image--34-.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/continuous-composites-to-support-u-s-army-devcom-aviation-and-missile-center-via-multi-year-contract

🚀 Solukon launches new software to support 'growing complexity' of 3D printed parts "SPR-Pathfinder PRO reflects years of listening to the market and advancing our software in step with the most demanding AM applications." Reported by TCT Magazine on Jun 22, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/06/PM_Pathfinder-PRO_2026_MT-Siemens-2048x1152.jpg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/solukon-launches-new-software-to-support-growing-complexity-of-3d-printed-parts

📰 ExOne targets small foundries with S-Print Pro sand binder jetting system ExOne has released the S-Print Pro, a compact industrial sand binder jetting system it says is built for small and mid-sized foundries, pattern makers, and print service providers that have … The post ExOne targets... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 22, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/ExOne-S-Print-Pro-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/exone-targets-small-foundries-with-s-print-pro-sand-binder-jetting-system

🦺 ScolioLife integrates 3D printing and AI platform into care model ScolioLife, an international scoliosis and spinal rehabilitation organization based in Singapore, is planning a full integration of 3D printing and artificial intelligence into its clinical operations, combining... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 22, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/ScolioLife-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/scoliolife-integrates-3d-printing-and-ai-platform-into-care-model

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #166 - 2026-06-22
item.description:
📷 SHINING 3D’s EinScan Libre used to digitize sculpture collection at Bremen’s Afroasiatic Gallery Okyena Collective, a Bremen-based creative studio founded by digital archivist and 3D artist Fara-Farai Awindor and fine artist Merci Ewuresi, has used SHINING 3D‘s EinScan Libre all-in-one laser 3D scanner … The... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 21, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Standalone-3D-scanning-cultural-heritage-artifacts-inside-Afroasiatic-Gallery-in-Bremen-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/shining-3ds-einscan-libre-used-to-digitize-sculpture-collection-at-bremens-afroasiatic-gallery

🚀 AIMMS gives US Marines metal additive manufacturing capability at the point of need Engineers at the Naval Surface Warfare Center, Carderock Division, have developed a transportable manufacturing system giving US Marines the ability to fabricate and repair metal components in forward-deployed... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 21, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Marine-Corps-AIMMS-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/aimms-gives-us-marines-metal-additive-manufacturing-capability-at-the-point-of-need

📰 Goal! 3D Printing for the 2026 FIFA World Cup The 2026 FIFA World Cup officially kicked off in Mexico City on June 11th. It’s the largest FIFA tournament in history, with 48 teams competing over 104 matches, reported by 3DPrint.com on Jun 21, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/327427/goal-3d-printing-for-2026-fifa-world-cup

📰 4D Printing Tech Is Here And It's Turning Waste Into Machines - Yahoo Tech 4D Printing Tech Is Here And It's Turning Waste Into Machines Yahoo Tech Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Jun 21, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMijgFBVV95cUxOSUd6THk4UkhYMUtvZ0tKR1Rlem1TNGJMZjdELUdWbFhMaWFJME5iaW5ScmJzYUR0T0lYanI5czBpaVNtN2sxN205RlhiMXg2elNScEt6dlBETEkyRmhaSDZ2RlROWXRWZVYxNzR5eHV1SmpJWjdxMTY1ejJwSnhRMS1wTWYzNE9vXzkzaUlR?oc=5

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #165 - 2026-06-21
item.description:
🔥 California, New York Aim To Ban 3D Printers That Can Make ‘Ghost Guns’ - Cowboy State Daily California, New York Aim To Ban 3D Printers That Can Make ‘Ghost Guns’ Cowboy State Daily Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Jun 20, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirgFBVV95cUxOSXFBaEZRbTVna3d1Q0NWOVVneWtvQ3FGbDVpSVk5b2dIMlNWdEZpdGdhcHByUlRBSDY3cW9WNVdxRjNxdGRyS000SnFENTRaQ2VVdkxzSGM0MFdhWkh2eW1aVHlFOFhlOTh2UDFZNjdaYUVWemRoMHd0RUJQUWdoMS1Xb0QzOFlCdkNOQTl3M0hXN0g0TndJeHZBUWp2X2Zfa3I0NE5qZHFlM3FZY2c?oc=5

🚀 Xometry adds materials, expert consultations and one-click reordering to its injection molding platform Xometry has rolled out a series of updates to its injection molding platform, targeting engineers and sourcing teams looking for faster, more consistent procurement workflows across high-volume production industries,... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 20, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/12/xometry-1-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/xometry-adds-materials-expert-consultations-and-one-click-reordering-to-its-injection-molding-platform

🚀 Newcastle University and Vindolanda use 3D scanning to reproduce Roman board game Researchers at Newcastle University’s School of Engineering worked with the Vindolanda Charitable Trust to produce a 3D printed replica of a Roman game board excavated at the Vindolanda Roman fort … The post... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 20, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Newcastle-Uni-Roman-Board-Games-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/newcastle-university-and-vindolanda-use-3d-scanning-to-reproduce-roman-board-game

🚀 Australia Is Turning to 3D Printing to Secure Its Industrial Foundation A new policy report from the Australian Strategic Policy Institute (ASPI), authored by Steven Camilleri, co-founder and CTO of metal 3D printing company SPEE3D, argues that national resilience is not a political... Titled Make Stuff Here… Or Else, the report introduces the concept of the “Sovereignty Countdown”: the measured window…, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jun 20, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Screenshot-2026-06-19-at-16.49.43-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/australia-is-turning-to-3d-printing-to-secure-its-industrial-foundation-252432

🏠 Havelar Prints a Public Building in Nine Days and Delivers It on Budget Portuguese firm Havelar erected a 500 m² recycling center office at the Ecocentro de Perafita in Porto for the Matosinhos municipality using a COBOD BOD2 3D printer, a four-person crew, and nine working days. More unusually still, the project came in on budget, a feat the partners themselves described as rare for public works in…, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jun 20, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Havelar-x-COBOD_1-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/havelar-prints-a-public-building-in-nine-days-and-delivers-it-on-budget-252428

💻 IMTS 2026 to Host Nine Conferences, Including New Industrial AI Event The International Manufacturing Technology Show (IMTS) 2026 will feature an expanded conference program spanning nine events and more than 90 sessions, with new additions targeting industrial artificial intelligence,... The show runs September 14–19 at McCormick Place in Chicago, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jun 20, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/IMTS-Conference-2024-150x100.jpg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/imts-2026-to-host-nine-conferences-including-new-industrial-ai-event-252443

🖨 China's New 3D Printing Method Can Print Something Almost Instantly - SlashGear China's New 3D Printing Method Can Print Something Almost Instantly SlashGear Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Jun 20, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikgFBVV95cUxORkIxNzhYZ2NPMFhpZXh4Z2lhbUpVWlE0d05yTWpuTFNrOWt6QlU3SnhsRkoyMTVxdy1DeXltWXpzZXVIMkY3UWpPdS1fMjc3SEpJdExidkdFdEY3MHRNX1I1ckt4NUkwRi10RHU2NC0xZkw5dVZoNDlMSzN3R01oaG92WXVLSW5LTTdwNEZmdkJjUQ?oc=5

📰 Salamanca student showcases advanced design skills with 3D printed school-themed coasters - Olean Star Salamanca student showcases advanced design skills with 3D printed school-themed coasters Olean Star Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Jun 20, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixwFBVV95cUxNSk44YWktcmExV1JFT1FUcTQwWlVXTTQtSkEwZGcxaWZPY3B2bkYzMElvNGJpclRKellSNkc5dUtBREFmWXNCMThmdUE1ZFBoUlVqUjg1eUVHUEpoN3UtM09Kb2gzY20wbVdHSTJZQWN0cFJCSngxLTU2NnhQYmxGS3d4R21UYzdqQ1hrcXUxdDREMmtyenNyTEE1Z3VtNFlqZDVxZ0g1My13eXdKWUpXcGYtT0NwODFydF9wZ1k0STVPNXVzYUQ4?oc=5

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #164 - 2026-06-20
item.description:
🚨 Bambu Lab Wants Home 3D Printing to Feel Less Like a Workshop with PLA Pure As desktop 3D printers become increasingly common in homes, Bambu Lab is focusing attention on something beyond print speed and hardware features. This week, the company launched a new filament,, reported by 3DPrint.com on Jun 19, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/327181/bambu-lab-wants-home-3d-printing-to-feel-less-like-a-workshop

🖨 Nikon SLM Solutions and NB Additive form North American partnership Nikon SLM Solutions and NB Additive have formed a strategic partnership to expand access to industrial metal additive manufacturing systems and build out integrated production workflows across North America. The … The post Nikon SLM Solutions and NB Additive form North American partnership appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Nikon-SLM-Solutions-and-NB-Additive-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/nikon-slm-solutions-and-nb-additive-form-north-american-partnership

🏠 AML3D delivers two ARCEMY X printers to Newport News Shipbuilding In October 2025, Australian AM company AML3D received an order from Newport News Shipbuilding (NNS) worth upwards of $3 million (AU$4.5M) for two custom ARCEMY X metal 3D printers. Now, … The post AML3D delivers two ARCEMY X printers to Newport News Shipbuilding appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/arcemy-1-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/aml3d-delivers-two-arcemy-x-printers-to-newport-news-shipbuilding

🚀 SHINING 3D Dental launches Ceramix-Nano chairside 3D printer SHINING 3D Dental has released the Ceramix-Nano, a chairside dental 3D printer capable of producing permanent ceramic crowns, veneers, inlays, onlays, and Maryland bridges within a single patient appointment. The … The post SHINING 3D Dental launches Ceramix-Nano chairside 3D printer appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/SHINING-3D-Ceramix-Nano-Capsule-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/shining-3d-dental-launches-ceramix-nano-chairside-3d-printer

💻 Why small-batch alloy development is becoming strategically important again In many important materials programs, the first useful quantity is much smaller. A research team may need enough powder to compare three or four variations of a new composition, reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 19, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/image-88-150x150.png Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/why-small-batch-alloy-development-is-becoming-strategically-important-again

📰 NAMI and MBK Global sign agreement to expand additive manufacturing across the Gulf Saudi Arabia’s National Innovation Industrial Company (NAMI) and Qatar-based MBK Global have signed a strategic framework agreement to develop advanced industrial solutions across the Gulf region, with additive... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 19, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/NAMI-MBK-Global-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/nami-and-mbk-global-sign-agreement-to-expand-additive-manufacturing-across-the-gulf

💻 Foundation Alloy Raises $22M in Series A for Solid State Molybdenum Foundation Alloy has just raised $22 million in Series A financing. The alloy company is trying to create a platform that will enable the solid state manufacturing of alloys, reported by 3DPrint.com on Jun 19, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/327105/foundation-alloy-raises-22m-for-solid-state-molybdenum

🖨 AM Asia Watch: China’s 3D Printing Boom Is Creating a New Class of Micro-Manufacturers China’s additive manufacturing (AM) industry has spent years trying to reduce its reliance on foreign technology. In polymer 3D printing, domestic companies have already become major players, reported by 3DPrint.com on Jun 19, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/326656/am-asia-watch-chinas-3d-printing-boom-is-creating-a-new-class-of-micro-manufacturers

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #163 - 2026-06-19
item.description:
🔥 Printing the Future: How Advanced 3D Printing Powders Are Powering the Next Industrial Revolution - vocal.media Printing the Future: How Advanced 3D Printing Powders Are Powering the Next Industrial Revolution vocal.media Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Jun 18, 2026. 🚀 Beehive Industries places $50m EOS order to scale 3D printed drone engine production Beehive Industries has committed more than $50 million to expand its fleet of EOS metal additive manufacturing systems, in what EOS described as the largest single publicly disclosed order in … The post Beehive... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 18, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Beehive-EOS-agreement-02-EOS_M4_ONYX-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/beehive-industries-places-50m-eos-order-to-scale-3d-printed-drone-engine-production

🖨 Rheinmetall UK using miniFactory 3D printer for tank ducting Rheinmetall UK, the primary defense contractor for the British Army, has made additive manufacturing an integral part of its Challenger 3 Main Battle Tank program. As the company recently revealed, … The post Rheinmetall UK using miniFactory 3D printer for tank ducting appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Rheinmetall-miniFactory-header-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/rheinmetall-uk-using-minifactory-3d-printer-for-tank-ducting

📰 TCT and SMF introduce next 3D printing Rising Star At just 14 years old, Neil Doherty is the youngest winner yet, and has been recognised for his inspiring progress in 3D printing. Reported by TCT Magazine on Jun 18, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/06/_AB55491.jpg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/tct-and-smf-introduce-next-3d-printing-rising-star

🚀 Stratasys launches flame-retardant FDM material for rail and transportation applications Stratasys has introduced FDM PA6/66-GF30-FR, a flame-retardant composite thermoplastic developed for rail and transportation manufacturers producing certified end-use and spare parts. The material is compatible with Stratasys’ Fortus 450mc and … The post Stratasys launches flame-retardant FDM material for rail and transportation applications appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive... Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Stratasys-FDM-PA666-GF30-FR-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/stratasys-launches-flame-retardant-fdm-material-for-rail-and-transportation-applications

📰 ORNL’s mold-free 3D printing method cuts composite fabrication time by 95% Researchers at the US Department of Energy’s Manufacturing Demonstration Facility (MDF) at Oak Ridge National Laboratory (ORNL) have developed a hybrid additive manufacturing method that removes the need for molds …... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 18, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/ORNL-mold-free-3D-printing-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/ornls-mold-free-3d-printing-method-cuts-composite-fabrication-time-by-95

🏠 Havelar constructs public building with COBOD 3D printing technology on budget The project, a 500 m² (5,400 ft²) recycling centre office at the Ecocentro de Perafita in Porto, was printed in nine days. Reported by TCT Magazine on Jun 18, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/06/image--30--1.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/havelar-constructs-public-building-with-cobod-3d-printing-technology-on-budget

🚀 Stratasys launches DM PA6/66-GF30-FR material for rail & transportation Engineered specifically for use on Stratasys' Fortus 450mc and F900 systems, Stratasys says the material has been designed to produce certified end-use parts and critical spare parts. Reported by TCT Magazine on Jun 18, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/06/Stratasys_PA6_66_rail_handle_train-1.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/stratasys-launches-dm-pa6-66-gf30-fr-material-for-rail-transportation

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #162 - 2026-06-18
item.description:
🔥 As California Debates AB 2047, New York’s Law Targeting 3D Printed Guns Prepares to Take Effect California’s controversial AB 2047 is still making its way through the state legislature. Meanwhile, in New York, lawmakers have already moved forward with similar restrictions for preventing the production of, reported by 3DPrint.com on Jun 17, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/326731/as-california-debates-ab-2047-new-yorks-law-targeting-3d-printed-guns-prepares-to-take-effect

🚨 ELEGOO Launches World's First Emoji Co-Branded 3D Printer - AndroidGuys ELEGOO Launches World's First Emoji Co-Branded 3D Printer AndroidGuys Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Jun 17, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimgFBVV95cUxPOWVMeC0xb3BQSG9yNlFpRTJfZ0lrSlBsN1VLU0E3bTdOY1JTN2ttMmotakdHMHp1cThCYTc2RFE2d0dVVmVXdGw2OUFpdURzaGZOVTFNSGktaDhnQWFxd3BVLWlPdHpRZ1BCc0loTkNFZVVUc18yb1Fmc1RSVmtyWHhnLWU4M3hQMTFodjZ2UVlvejdQRzUyTFB3?oc=5

📰 Italian Exhibition Group and AFEMO renew partnership Italian Exhibition Group (IEG) and AFEMO — the Italian Association of Manufacturers and Exporters of Jewelry Machinery — have renewed their strategic partnership for the 2026–2028 period, reinforcing the... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 17, 2026.
